name: SelectDB
description: Commercial cloud data warehouse built on Apache Doris by the projects core Chinese team.

seo.title: SelectDB — DBaaS / Serverless Databases
seo.meta_description: SelectDB: Commercial cloud data warehouse built on Apache Doris by the projects core Chinese team.

when_to_use: Managed cloud data warehouse on Apache Doris by core team
Sub-second OLAP queries on the managed SelectDB cloud
Replacing self-managed Doris clusters with hosted SelectDB
Real-time analytics at scale for Chinese SaaS companies
Cloud-native Doris deployment for high-concurrency BI workloads

pros: Managed cloud Doris from the core team
cons: Newer cloud service, less battle-tested abroad
Primarily available on Alibaba and AWS
Smaller ecosystem than Snowflake or ClickHouse Cloud
review.verdict: Smart pick if you're already committed to Apache Doris, less mature than Snowflake or ClickHouse Cloud alternatives.
review.best_for: Teams on Apache Doris wanting a managed service from the original authors
review.not_for: Greenfield analytics needing the richest ecosystem and broad regional coverage
